gates.label: Media Sources
gates.nextAction: Monitor approved preview audio, video, and radio sources during pilot QA.
gates.verification: Run media contract, browser-flow, live-site, and release-readiness QA after any media source change.

gates.label: Inbox Notifications
gates.nextAction: Configure the approved sender and inbox provider, then replay pending inbox records.
gates.verification: Run provider readiness and form delivery QA after inbox setup.

gates.label: Private Handoff
gates.nextAction: Monitor the signed Firebase private handoff during pilot QA; choose an external CRM or Google workflow target only after the private workflow is approved.
gates.verification: Run provider readiness, integration QA, and pending handoff replay after any target change.

gates.label: Operator Reporting
gates.nextAction: Use the approved operator token to review live pilot reporting and provider readiness during each launch check.
gates.verification: Run provider readiness with LUX_REPORT_TOKEN to confirm live reporting access.

gates.label: Privacy Review
gates.nextAction: Complete legal review of the Privacy page before full public launch.
gates.verification: Mark Privacy approved in the legal review manifest, then run release-readiness QA.

gates.label: Terms Review
gates.nextAction: Complete legal review of the Terms page before full public launch.
gates.verification: Mark Terms approved in the legal review manifest, then run release-readiness QA.

gates.label: WWW Redirect
gates.nextAction: Monitor www.luxveritas.media during launch checks; Firebase certificate and Hosting mapping returned HTTP 200.
gates.verification: Run domain-readiness QA during release checks and confirm https://www.luxveritas.media returns HTTP 200 or redirects to https://luxveritas.media.
